name: NYMOX PHARMACEUT.
summary: Nymox Pharmaceutical Corporation is a biopharmaceutical company engaged in the research and development of therapies targeting urological conditions and central nervous system disorders. Headquartered in Nassau, Bahamas, the company focuses on developing innovative treatments for prostate enlargement and Alzheimer's disease. Nymox is dedicated to advancing novel therapies to address unmet medical needs in these areas.
